summary: Iteration 46: User ID Cards, Audio Memory Features Testing. All 9 backend tests PASSED (100%). Frontend testing confirmed ID Cards tab works correctly showing Guardian Member Card and 4 Student ID cards with Code/Save buttons. Audio Memories tab functional with correct 'Allow for Audio Books' button text (verified in code).

issues: Referral/login URLs show internal preview domain instead of production semanticvision.ai

action_items: Update APP_URL environment variable in backend to use production domain (currently showing preview URL in ID cards)
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/user-card correctly returns guardian_card and student_cards with all required fields
Recording upload correctly creates notification in messages collection (lines 87-99 of recordings.py)
UserIDCards.jsx correctly displays guardian and student cards with Code/Save buttons using html2canvas for download
AudioMemoryTab.jsx shows 'Allow for Audio Books' button with text+icon for analyzed recordings (line 131)
ReadAloudRecorder.jsx has chunked auto-save every 15s with 'Auto-saved' indicator badge (lines 206-210)

success_rate.frontend: 100% - ID Cards tab displays correctly with guardian and 4 student cards

context_for_next_testing_agent: User ID Cards feature is fully functional. Access: login as admin -> Parent Portal -> skip onboarding -> ID Cards tab. Guardian card shows referral code REF-THYT3T, 4 students count. Student cards show student codes (STU-xxx), reading level, login URL. Code button copies to clipboard, Save button downloads PNG via html2canvas. Audio Memories tab works but has no recordings in test account. APP_URL env should be updated to production domain for correct URLs in cards.
